emails.subject: 1/31 In the Money CP's
emails.body: 1/31 In the Money CP's Elena, Yesterday's list of in the money CP's did not change. We will forward a list of out of the money CP's shortly. We will also send IT the list so that they can begin moving them to another book. There are appox 140 CP's so the move will take some time. DG
